text: A {{c1::model}} is considered fair when its predictions do not systematically disadvantage a protected group without a justifiable business reason.
explanation: Fairness is a socio-technical question, not only a statistical one. It is about impact, representation, and accountability.
usage: Used in governance checks for hiring, lending, healthcare, and public services.
spanish: Un modelo se considera justo cuando sus predicciones no perjudican de forma sistemática a un grupo protegido sin una razón justificable.

text: {{c1::Privacy}}-preserving AI systems reduce the chance of exposing personal data by using minimization, access controls, and anonymization techniques.
explanation: Even if a model performs well, it may still create unacceptable risk if it handles sensitive data poorly.
usage: Critical in healthcare, finance, education, and customer support deployments.
spanish: Los sistemas de IA que preservan la privacidad reducen el riesgo de exposición de datos personales mediante minimización, controles de acceso y técnicas de anonimización.

text: {{c1::Explainability}} refers to the degree to which a human can understand why an AI system produced a given output.
explanation: Explainability is essential for trust, debugging, compliance, and safe human oversight.
usage: widely required in regulated industries and high-stakes decisions.
spanish: La explicabilidad se refiere al grado en que una persona puede entender por qué un sistema de IA produjo una salida determinada.

text: An {{c1::auditable}} AI system records the data lineage, model version, and decision process needed for independent review.
explanation: Auditability gives organizations evidence that systems were built and operated according to policy.
usage: Important for governance committees and compliance teams.
spanish: Un sistema de IA auditable registra la procedencia de los datos, la versión del modelo y el proceso de decisión requerido para una revisión independiente.
